content: EF Core IgnoreQueryFilters for admin bypass: .IgnoreQueryFilters() on a LINQ query bypasses all global filters. EF Core 10 named filters: .IgnoreQueryFilters(["TenantIsolation"]) bypasses only tenant filter, preserving soft-delete filter. SuperAdmin queries use .IgnoreQueryFilters() to see all tenants. For repositories that need cross-tenant access (e.g. SuperAdmin user list), inject ITenantService and call repo method that appends .IgnoreQueryFilters() when IsSuperAdmin is true. Alternative: nullable _tenantId in DbContext — when null, filter passes all rows via HasQueryFilter(e => _tenantId == null || e.GroupId == _tenantId).
